title: DDL, Constraints, Schema Evolution, and Integrity Repair · Stakeholder Data Mission
summary: A product engineering team. The team needs a normalized schema, constraints, repeatable import, guarded changes, and a reversible migration. Planned artifact: Deliver Integrity-Safe Ticket Workflow with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a named uniqueness conflict and explicit update policy for idempotent ingestion.
Defend decomposition with lossless-join and dependency-preservation evidence and justify bounded denormalization.
Enforce NOT NULL, UNIQUE, CHECK, primary-key, and foreign-key invariants at the database boundary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Project Upsert Conflict
steps.instruction:
project case — Import ticket 205 twice, reassign one unowned ticket, reject an invalid severity, and migrate a required category field without breaking the old writer. Preview mutation scope and retain rollback plus changed-row evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Migration Expand Contract
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable SQLite increment headed "-- Evidence: sql-migration-expand-contract-1xk1x2" with a concrete grain, hypothesis, or prediction; DDL constraint, migration, or integrity-repair evidence; and an observation, reconciliation, or verification tied to returned rows, changed rows, an error, or a plan.

Evidence target: Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Migration Expand Contract.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Migration Expand Contract into observable performance evidence. For Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Migration Expand Contract, keep Migration Expand Contract connected to executable relational evidence.

  assigned_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
